title: BerserkMine
description: This mod adds items and entities from the manga "Berserk"
body:
R.I.P Kentaro Miura

This mod adds:
- Dragon Slayer(Right-click to use it's ability)
- Gut's Golden Age Sword
- Puck(Right-Click to collect dust)
- Elf Dust
- Crazy Horse
- Crazy Dog
- Cultist
- Crazy Cultist
- Great Goat
